calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER HANSON BRIDGETT'S Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
